page: Amazon Web Services x8aedz.metal-24xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server instance powered by AMD processors. It features 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 5.0 GHz. The system allocates dedicated CPU resources with a single thread per core, ensuring predictable compute execution without hyperthreading overhead.

This server is configured with 3072.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 32.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes 7600 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, providing high-capacity, low-latency local storage directly attached to the bare-metal hardware.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 75 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the bare-metal architecture and high memory-to-CPU ratio position this instance for workloads requiring massive memory footprints and direct hardware access, though the lack of GPU acceleration limits its applicability for hardware-accelerated machine learning.

The hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise applications that require substantial RAM capacity alongside high-speed local NVMe storage.
description: Amazon Web Services x8aedz.metal-24xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server powered by AMD processors on the x86_64 architecture. It features 96 dedicated physical cores operating at 5.0 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 3072.0 GB of RAM, providing an extensive 32.0 GB of memory per core, alongside 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 75 Gbps. With its high memory density and bare-metal access, this instance is designed for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and memory-intensive enterprise workloads that require direct hardware control without virtualization overhead.

tagline: A bare-metal server combining ninety-six high-frequency AMD cores with three terabytes of system memory and high-capacity local NVMe storage.
